testcase.name: test_daily_verse_italian

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'verse' in {'language': 'it', 'reference': 'Salmi 23:3', 'text': 'Egli ristora la mia anima, mi guida per sentieri di giustizia per amore del suo nome.'}

testcase.name: test_daily_verse_english

failure.message: assert 'verse' in {'language': 'en', 'reference': 'Psalms 23:3', 'text': "He restoreth my soul: he leadeth me in the paths of righteousness for his name's sake."}

testcase.name: test_daily_verse_spanish

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'verse' in {'language': 'es', 'reference': 'Salmos 23:3', 'text': 'Confortará mi alma; me guiará por sendas de justicia por amor de su nombre.'}
